ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION NOTICE OF MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL APPEARANCES: ERIK C. VAN HESPEN MOVING TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS MURDIS SANDERS, ETC., ET AL. THERE BEING NO OPPOSITION TO COUNSEL'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW, THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE REPORTER: ERIC L. THRONE, CSR 7855
REMOVED FROM ASBESTOS STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR ON FEB-19-2003, NO APPEARANCE.
